channel.title: Nyx | News & release notes
channel.description: Release notes and project updates for Nyx and Nyx Agent.

item.title: Nyx Agent is live
item.dc:creator: Eli Peter
item.description: Nyx Agent runs local pentests against development apps. It reads the repo, checks the local target, and keeps proof with the run.

item.title: More bug classes, less auth noise
item.dc:creator: Eli Peter
item.description: Nyx 0.7.0 adds seven vulnerability classes, deeper FastAPI auth tracking, parser hardening checks, and a quieter auth report.

item.title: Data exfiltration gets its own lane
item.dc:creator: Eli Peter
item.description: Nyx 0.6.0 adds a data-exfiltration rule for outbound HTTP bodies, headers, and JSON payloads across the supported language packs.

item.title: The local UI lands
item.dc:creator: Eli Peter
item.description: Nyx 0.5.0 ships the local browser UI, an SSA-based taint engine, deeper cross-file analysis, and symbolic execution.

item.title: Ranking, state checks, and quieter output
item.dc:creator: Eli Peter
item.description: Nyx 0.4.0 adds finding ranking, lower-noise defaults, state analysis, inline ignores, and a cleaner CLI.

item.title: Config, SARIF, and a cleanup pass
item.dc:creator: Eli Peter
item.description: Nyx 0.3.0 adds configurable rules, SARIF output, source-kind severity, non-prod downgrades, and resource leak detection.

item.title: Cross-file analysis starts doing real work
item.dc:creator: Eli Peter
item.description: Nyx 0.2.0 adds two-pass cross-file taint analysis, CFG detectors, persisted function summaries, and multi-language analysis support.

item.title: The first scan path
item.dc:creator: Eli Peter
item.description: The early Nyx alpha releases added tree-sitter pattern scanning, SQLite-backed indexes, and the first Rust CFG experiments.
